comments.comment:
CGT distills its dirty MEK based topcoats and inks to produce a clean distillate that is high in MEK content. The distillate is usually sold to a nearby recycler, Aimco Solrec and is used in- house as a cleaning solvent.
 In 2001, our distillation unit m

The end users that buy our scrap vinyl are ever changing. Many times markets dry up, therefore, material must be landfilled. The zinc would be encapsulated in this vinyl as would any other element that will be listed from here on in

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
There was approximately an 18% increase(over 1997)in toluene due to the ì
addition of our Dry Laminator department.

This substance is a major component of vinyl. CGT sends vinyl trim and ì
scrap off site to be recycled, therefore, this plasticizer is also being ì
recycled.

For the 1998 reporting year CGT has made tremendous leaps in their ì
recycling efforts for all their scrap vinyl. Basically through various ì
plasticrecyclers the majority of trimmings and vinyl sheeting are re - ì
worked into a product that can be sold.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
MEK is present in all ink formulations used at CGT. It is also used as a ì
cleaning solvent in printing and mixing departments.

Antimony and its compounds are encapsulated in vinyl which inturn is sent ì
off site for recycling purposes. No landfilling occurred in 1998.

site as scrap trimmings scrap rolled goods and sheets where it is recycled ì
by plastic manmufacturers.

This toluene waste is generated in the Dry Laminator department.  It is ì
used as a thinning agent for the adhesive and adhesive waste.

Toluene is present in the MEK sludge and ink residue that is sent to ì
Fielding Chemicals Inc. for reclamation.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Toluene is present in most of the top finish, ink and adhesive ì
formulations used at CGT.  It is also used for cleaning purposes in the ì
printing and mixing departments.

This substance is a main component of vinyl.  CGT sends vinyl trim and ì
scrap off-site to be recycled; therefore, this plasticizer is being ì
recycled also.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
MEK is present in all ink formulations used at CGT.  Furthermore, it is ì
used extensively as a cleaning solvent in the printing and mixing ì
department.

Antimony is a component found in vinyl.  When vinyl is sent off-site for ì
recycling the antimony encapsulated in the vinyl is also recycled.

Scrap vinyl is sent off-site to be recycled.  It is ground up and ì
pelletized.   This vinyl material contains several additives including ì
cadmium.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Cadmium is present in some stabilizers.  CGT is constantly looking for ì
alternative brands that do not contain cadmium.

The lead that is recycled is encapsulated in CGT's vinyl trim and sheetingì
that is sent off-site for recycling.  It is difficult to maintain constant ì
customers for our trim and scrap vinyl materials becuase the market ì
demand fluctuates significantly.
Zinc is recycled as an encapsulated component within PVC trim and scrap.  ì
